title: teucrium divaricatum subsp. athoum
intro: Teucrium divaricatum subsp. athoum, a subspecies of the Teucrium divaricatum plant, is a type of herbaceous perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Teucrium divaricatum subsp. athoum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
